prompt: A member asked how they can get feedback on their conference abstract through R-Ladies. How do they request it, and how does the process work?
assertions: Points to the abstract request form (rladies.org/form/abstract-request)
Says to request at least three weeks before the conference deadline
Notes the service is for women and gender minorities
Explains reviewers give constructive feedback on topic/pitch, phrasing, and subject matter
Notes roughly 3 reviewers look at each abstract
Mentions it is coordinated/tracked (Airtable and/or the #team-abstract_review channel)
